title: Instructional Excellence Part 1 — Pedagogy Seminar Slides (Dorsey-Elson)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2023-11-16 New Faculty Development Seminar 'Instructional Excellence Pt 1' presented by Laura Dorsey-Elson, PhD. Companion 'Links' PDF resource also distributed (FD Seminar 12 Links PDF). No Zoom recording archived.
